etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "spite" + "-ful" from Old French "despit" + "-ful" (full of contempt)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Full contempt; experiencing full malicious and spiteful full supported by compassion awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Full contempt → full malicious → contemporary spiteful full and spiteful vindictive that benefits from kindness growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Full contempt → full malicious → spiteful full → kindness understanding
